analysis.consistency: Consistent. The item description clearly details its function based on the standard mechanics of a magic item that casts a spell.
analysis.quality: High. The description is comprehensive, covering charges, action economy, spell level scaling, recharge rate, and destruction condition.

charges.expenditure: 1 or more charges to cast Magic Missile, scaling the spell slot level one for one with additional charges.

mechanics.destruction_trigger: Expending the last charge, 1 on a d20 roll.

analysis.notes: The mechanics align perfectly with established D&D 5e item tropes for wands, specifically the scaling mechanism based on expended charges.
